privileged_info_summary: This task operates on real email data from the SpamAssassin public corpus (2,500+ legitimate emails). The metadata specifies correct values for all required fields: folder creation target 'Pending-Patches', output directory '/home/ga/Documents/patches' for extracted patches, email recipient 'release-lead@company.com' for status report, minimum of 3 patch emails to move, and minimum of 2 patch files to extract and save. The SpamAssassin corpus contains real code patches (confirmed: 15 patch emails in sample of 2,501 emails, marked with 'Index:' header from CVS/patch commit logs). The task setup automatically ensures sufficient patch emails are available by duplicating real patches if the corpus contains fewer than 5.
